description: Verso: Document in Judaeo-Arabic. Complete but very faded. Resembles a legal query: "What have our sages said concerning a man who died... [with] a mature son and a mature daughter, and it was found with his daughter... her brother said to her...." The document goes on to talk about a sum of money and daily payments over a period of 3 years. The last line refers to recording/certifying something in a court. The details are very obscure. AA. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
